description_long: This is a small, twin-engine propeller airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features a pair of engines mounted on the wings, each with a two-blade propeller, and has a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and has side windows, suggesting seating for two or more occupants. The airplane's exterior is primarily white with green accents on the wingtips, tail, and engine nacelles, and it has fixed tricycle landing gear visible beneath the fuselage and wings. The wings are straight with slight dihedral and are equipped with small winglets at the tips. The overall design is typical of light general aviation aircraft used for personal or small business transport.
description: A small, twin-engine propeller airplane with a white and green color scheme, low-mounted straight wings, and a conventional tail. It features an enclosed cockpit and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, both engines, and the green-tipped wings and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin propellers, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical wing and landing gear arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the fuselage, engines, and green accents on the wingtips and tail.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail structure, both engines from behind, and the full wingspan with green-tipped winglets.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and small upturned winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows and a clear canopy, likely multi-seat.
